label: http api • prefix_hits increases after a prefix-sharing second request
query: Summarize in one sentence: a lighthouse keeper walks the same spiral staircase every evening at dusk to light the lamp.
notes: The live cross-check for the in-process CacheProof suite: two prefix-sharing chat requests over real HTTP, then /admin/cache-stats must report a higher aggregate prefix-hit count than before. SKIPs when the host has no local cache-enabled model. Off-CI (needs a local model).
